claims.summary: Semantic correspondence and spectral context need explicit linkage.
claims.disposition: verify relational_intent, shared_memory_anchor, reflection_surface, and transition_payload spectral_delta

claims.summary: A direct sentiment and reply must remain in one traceable thread.
claims.disposition: verify native reply links and persistence IDs

claims.summary: Specific sentiment acknowledgement may differ from generic influence.
claims.disposition: route a bounded exact-anchor uptake comparison with right to ignore

claims.summary: Pressure may differ between ambient spectral influence and direct correspondence.
claims.disposition: route a matched read-only pressure-versus-intent replay without treating correlation as intended exertion

claims.summary: Applying resonance alignment as pressure or regulator influence would mutate live peer state.
claims.disposition: keep alignment metadata observational and require Tier 5 approval for any applied path
